resources.string: Thank you for creating an account
For added security, please verify at least one additional login method.
You can change the language in your profile settings when you have signed in.
This phone number is linked to an existing Paysmart account. Please login to continue.
Enter your phone number to set up your account
Unable to start phone verification. Please retry.
Enter the phone number associated with your PaySmart account
Stay updated on PaySmart products and services. You can opt out of these communications at any time.
By continuing, you agree to our
including identity verification with trusted third parties and your mobile service providers.
To access your paysmart account, please enter your password.
Use 12+ characters with uppercase, lowercase, a number, and a symbol to keep your account protected.
Change your password to recover your account.
This 4–6-digit code is used to unlock your app and confirm actions locally.
Lost access to my phone number? Change your phone number without losing access to your account.
Verify your email to keep your account secured.
Verifying your email helps you safely recover your account if you lose access to your phone. We will also send secure communication to your email address.
Why add an extra verification method?

Linking a second method like Google, Facebook, or email helps you recover access if you lose your primary login. It also keeps your account more secure from unauthorized access. We recommend setting this up before continuing.
Add a passcode to keep your money and personal information safe. Only you will be able to access your PaySmart account.
Setting up a passcode is required to protect your PaySmart account and financial data. It helps ensure only you can access your funds, even if your device is lost or stolen.
A PaySmart update is ready. Restart to finish installing it.
Stripe cards and Flutterwave funding accounts
Need help? We have got you
Manage account protection, sign-in options, and privacy controls.
Review saved cards and permanent funding accounts linked to your wallet.
Review the payment methods PaySmart uses for top ups and payouts. Bank accounts are powered by Flutterwave, and saved cards will appear here once Stripe card vault data is available.
Permanent local funding accounts for receiving money into your wallet.
Cards saved during Stripe checkout will be managed here.
When you save a card during a Stripe payment, you will be able to review, update, or remove it here.
Checking Stripe for the latest cards saved to your wallet.
We could not load your saved cards right now. Try refreshing again.
This screen is ready for masked card details, default card status, and remove or update actions as soon as the Stripe payment-method pipeline is exposed in the app.
App information, version details, and legal references.
Unable to open this action right now.
Unable to open your email app right now.
Hi there, how can we help?
Fast answers to all of the most common questions.
Chat with our team of experts
Call us to speak to a support agent
Join our social media to view latest information
Continue without selecting a transaction and tell us what happened.
Tell us as much as you can about the problem and we\'ll be in touch soon
Loading profile details from local cache.
You are unable to edit this profile because your account has already been verified. If you need to make changes, please contact customer support.
Your account setup is incomplete. Finish the following steps to complete verification.
Add and verify your home address
Your profile verification is complete. Continue to secure your account.
You skipped 2-step verification during onboarding. Enable it now from Security settings.
Protect your account with an extra sign-in step
PaySmart can require an additional verification code on new devices. You can change this later in profile settings.
Verify your email first to continue with 2-step verification setup.
2-step verification is already enabled for this account.
Enter the SMS code sent to your phone.
Enter the verification code for your enrolled second factor to finish signing in.
Choose where to send your code
Limits are derived from current verification status and update after successful sync.
Select an account to see send and receive limit.
How much can you send and receive with your %1$s PaySmart account
Choose a timeframe for your statement and select the format you want it in.
Statement export is not connected yet. This form is ready for the statement pipeline.
Enter your house info and postcode. We will resolve a verified address from map providers.
Please confirm your resolved address on the map.
Review and edit your address details before saving.
Have you lived at this address for more than 6 months?
Identity verification is the final setup step for account limits and high-risk actions.
To comply with financial regulations and help prevent fraud, we may ask for a photo of your ID and a selfie to confirm it is really you.
This usually takes about 2 minutes to complete.
Ensure all text on your ID is readable.
Make sure the full ID is visible and there is no glare or reflection.
Use good lighting and keep your face clearly visible.
Remove anything obscuring your face, such as hats or glasses.
By continuing, you consent to identity verification checks and the processing of your data for fraud prevention and compliance.
Choose an ID to use. Documents from your issuing country are usually the fastest for us to review.
2. Confirm name and date of birth match your profile.
Identity upload submitted. Verification is pending review.
This document type is currently not accepted.
This document type is accepted but upload is not yet enabled in this build.
Camera permission is required to capture your document.
We are reviewing your identity now.
We will review your document and identity details.
We may ask for a clearer capture if anything needs another check.
You can keep using the features currently available on your account.
Top up your wallet with Stripe PaymentSheet (sandbox).
Light, dark, or follow your device
Switch the visual tone used across cards and surfaces
No transactions yet for this currency.
No wallet balance data is available yet.
Use these details to complete your one-time bank transfer top up.
Transfer the exact amount shown above.
This virtual account is for this top up only and cannot be reused.
Your wallet updates after Flutterwave confirms the transfer.
You earned points from your transaction
Rewards currently sync as a single wallet balance. Detailed earning history is not available yet.
Try a different amount, provider, or reference.
PaySmart app updates and new product announcements will appear here.
Account updates, product launches, and app install prompts will appear here.
Identity, security, and account activity alerts.
New features, launches, and PaySmart announcements.
Downloaded app updates ready to install.
There was a problem connection to our servers. Please try again.
Secure, passwordless authentication across your devices
Use provider handoff for start, callback and resume while local flow stays isolated.
We sent a verification email to
Click the link in the email to verify your address. Check spam if it is missing from inbox.
Enter your full legal name exactly as it appears on your government ID.
You must be 18 or older to use PaySmart.
For your security, please verify your identity
Phone verification is not available on this device. Use another linked sign-in method to continue.
No alternative recovery method is linked to this account yet.
We are sending your verification code now. Delivery can take longer on slower networks.
Did not receive it? Retry in %1$d seconds
Unable to finish account setup. Please retry.
Enter your 4-digit passcode to log in
Use your current local password to set a new one.
Confirm your current passcode, then choose a new 4–6-digit code for this device.
Unable to update the passcode right now.
Use biometrics before changing your transaction passcode.
Verify a new phone number to keep account recovery and sign-in secure.
Add money is not available in %1$s yet.
We will enable top ups in %1$s once a supported funding provider is live for that market.
Transfer to the provided account and refresh status after payment lands.
Your payment session is ready to continue.
We are still waiting for the payment provider to confirm this session.
Your wallet top up was confirmed successfully.
This session could not be completed. Try again or create a new one.
This session is no longer active. Create a new session to continue.
This completes SEND-002 UI flow state. Transfer creation comes in SEND-003/004.
Search by tag, email, or mobile number
We fill recipient details from screenshot/photo/PDF
Request recipient bank details by email
Account setup in a few clear steps
We tailor this to your country (%1$s) and keep extra checks behind feature access.
Enter your full legal name, email and date of birth exactly as shown on your government ID.
Used for account recovery and secure sign-in fallback. We will never ask you to share it.
Faster secure access. If skipped, reminders may appear in security prompts.
Link Google/Facebook or add email manually. You can skip now and verify later when features require it.
What do you want to do first?
We will shape your first PaySmart steps for %1$s and keep the rest ready when you need it.
You can still unlock more features later. Start with the path that gets value into your hands fastest.
Set up your weekly invoice flow for shifts, freelance work, hospitality, care, or agency jobs.
Best for UK workers who invoice every week and want a faster route to their first finished PDF.
Prepare your wallet for funding, balances, and future payments once the required checks are complete.
Your email has been successfully verified.
Earn more by completing transfers and invites
Services unlock after completing required security steps.
Complete these checks to unlock add money.
Complete these checks to unlock your local funding account.
Complete these checks to unlock send money.
Protect invoice data with at least two security methods before you create and share invoices.
Enable at least two security methods
Create or manage your permanent %1$s funding account for wallet top ups in %2$s.
We are loading your latest account details.
Transfer funds to this account to top up your PaySmart wallet.
We are still waiting for Flutterwave to finish preparing this account.
Provision a permanent local account number for fast NGN wallet funding.
Receive money is not available yet
We will enable permanent funding accounts in %1$s once that market is fully supported.
A verified BVN or NIN is required before we can issue this permanent NGN funding account.
We could not prepare your funding account
Please refresh or try provisioning your account again.
For domestic transfers within the UK only
UK local account details are coming here

This dedicated GBP account route is ready for a licensed UK banking partner. When PaySmart enables that flow, this screen will show your account holder name, sort code, account number, bank name, and share actions.
Your money will be held with a licensed UK banking partner when this route goes live.
Your recent transaction activity will show here when you send, receive, or deposit money.
Live FX quotes for popular destinations, powered by the current PaySmart rate feed.
We could not load live FX quotes right now. Use refresh or try again shortly.
Identity verified. Full limits are active.
Verify identity to unlock higher limits.
Add and verify home address to continue.
Your transactions will show here when you receive, send, add, or convert money.
This password is stored locally for secure account recovery. Never share it. PaySmart will never ask for it.
Do you have a referral code?
Use a referral code to get %1$s after you transfer above %2$s
*By clicking submit, you agree to our terms and conditions.
I don’t have a referral code
Secure your account and do even more
Your account is protected with biometric authentication
Enable passkey to protect this device with passwordless sign-in
Secure, passwordless authentication across your devices
You skipped passkey setup during onboarding. Enable it now from Security settings.
Earn more by completing transfers and invites
Unable to update photo right now.
Camera permission is required to take a profile photo. You can still choose one from your gallery.
Add an email or phone number
I agree to PaySmart securely sharing my details (name, address, and date of birth) with credit bureaus to assess eligibility and offer suitable credit products.
I am happy for PaySmart to share my name, email address and app events with social media platforms.
